boundary: Candidate synchronization report only. It does not publish public surfaces and does not authorize a public Beta15.2 release.

surfaces.notes: CLI candidate package, package smoke and dry-run evidence are staged in the CLI PR.
Docs describe Beta15.2 as a pre-public candidate and keep live installer verification explicit.
Public skill is version-independent and points to the Beta15.2 candidate boundary.
Web/curl metadata is staged as candidate-only and must not deploy independently.
